# Dependencies: Form 1040 Line 21 — Total Nonrefundable Credits (2025)

> Re-authored 2026-06-14. Source of truth: `lines/21.md`.

---

## Formula

```
Form1040.line21 = nz(Form1040.line19) + nz(Form1040.line20)
```

where `nz(x) = safeAmount(x)` treats null/blank as zero.

Storage convention: **null-when-zero** — `tac.setTotalCredits(line21 > 0 ? line21 : null)`.

Implemented inline (3 statements) inside `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:26987-26990`.

---

## Inputs to Line 21

| Input | Source line | Source method | Java getter | Storage convention |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Line 19 — CTC / ODC | Schedule 8812 line 14 | `computeSchedule8812()` | `TaxAndCredits.getChildTaxCredit()` | always-set |
| Line 20 — Schedule 3 line 8 | Schedule 3 Part I line 8 | `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` (reads `schedule3.getNonrefundableCredits().getTotalNonrefundableCredits()`) | `TaxAndCredits.getOtherCreditsSchedule3()` | null-when-zero |

### Line 19 upstream chain (Schedule 8812 line 14)

| Credit | Source | Java method |
|---|---|---|
| Child Tax Credit ($2,200/qualifying child) | dependent flag `qualifiesChildTaxCredit` | `computeSchedule8812()` |
| Credit for Other Dependents ($500) | dependent flag `qualifiesCreditOtherDependents` | `computeSchedule8812()` |

Line 19 is limited by Credit Limit Worksheet A (CLW-A) which reads `totalTaxBeforeCredits` (line 18) minus prior Schedule 3 credits. MFS-protected via 19 #1 (form2555Spouse null-shadowed at the `computeSchedule8812` call site).

### Line 20 upstream chain (Schedule 3 Part I — 17 credit fields)

| Credit | Schedule 3 line | Source form | Apply method |
|---|---|---|---|
| Foreign Tax Credit | 1 | Form 1116 | `applyForeignTaxCreditToSchedule3()` |
| Child/Dependent Care | 2 | Form 2441 | `applyForm2441ToSchedule3()` |
| Education Credits (LLC) | 3 | Form 8863 | `applyForm8863ToSchedule3()` |
| Retirement Savings | 4 | Form 8880 | `applyForm8880ToSchedule3()` |
| Residential Clean Energy | 5a | Form 5695 | `applyForm5695ToSchedule3()` |
| Energy Efficient Home Improvement | 5b | Form 5695 | `applyForm5695ToSchedule3()` |
| General Business Credit | 6a | Form 3800 (OOS) | — |
| Prior Year Min Tax Credit | 6b | Form 8801 | `applyForm8801ToSchedule3()` |
| Adoption Credit | 6c | Form 8839 | `applyAdoptionCredit()` |
| Elderly/Disabled Credit | 6d | Schedule R | `applyScheduleRToSchedule3()` |
| Clean Vehicle Credit | 6f | Form 8936 | `applyForm8936ToSchedule3()` |
| Mortgage Interest Credit | 6g | Form 8396 | `applyForm8396ToSchedule3()` |
| DC First-Time Homebuyer | 6h | Form 8859 | `applyForm8859ToSchedule3()` |
| Qualified Electric Vehicle | 6i | Form 8834 | — |
| Alternative Fuel Refueling | 6j | Form 8911 | `applyForm8911ToSchedule3()` |
| Credit to Holders of Tax Credit Bonds | 6k | Form 8912 | — |
| Form 8978 negative line 14 | 6l | Form 8978 | (negative-pushout routing) |
| Previously Owned Clean Vehicles | 6m | Form 8936 | `applyForm8936ToSchedule3()` |
| Other nonrefundable write-ins | 6z | — | — |
| Sum lines 6a–6z | 7 | — | `finalizeSchedule3Totals()` |
| **Total Part I** | **8** | — | `finalizeSchedule3Totals()` |

Line 20 is MFS-protected transitively via 20 #1 (each per-credit form handles its own MFS state).

---

## Outputs from Line 21

| Output | Java field | Downstream consumer | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `totalCredits` (line 21) | `TaxAndCredits.totalCredits` | Line 22 in same method | null when zero |
| `taxAfterCredits` (line 22) | `TaxAndCredits.taxAfterCredits` | Line 24 in same method; Form 2210 Part I line 1 | always-set; floor at 0 |
| `totalTax` (line 24) | `TaxAndCredits.totalTax` | Lines 25–38 payments / refund / owed | zero-when-zero (never null) |

---

## Compute Order

```
computeSchedule8812()                       → sets tac.childTaxCredit (line 19)
applyXxxToSchedule3() [each credit form]    → populates Schedule3 credit fields
finalizeSchedule3Totals()                   → sets schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.totalNonrefundableCredits (Schedule 3 line 8)
finalizeSchedule2OtherTaxes()               → sets tac.otherTaxes (line 23) — runs BEFORE computeLine20ThroughLine24
computeLine20ThroughLine24() {
    line20 = schedule3.nonrefundableCredits.totalNonrefundableCredits   (null-when-zero)
    line21 = safeAmount(line19) + safeAmount(line20)                    ← THIS LINE (null-when-zero)
    line22 = max(0, line18 - line21)                                    (always-set; floor at 0)
    line24 = line22 + safeAmount(line23)                                (zero-when-zero)
}
computeLine31ThroughLine38()                → reads tac.getTotalTax() (line 24) for payments / refund / owed
```

Single method handles lines 20 + 21 + 22 + 24 (4 fields, 1 pass).

---

## PDF Field Mapping

| Form 1040 line | PDF semantic key | AcroForm field | Page |
|---|---|---|---|
| 19 | `line19_child_tax_credit` | `f2_11[0]` | 2 |
| 20 | `line20_amount_from_schedule3_line8` | `f2_12[0]` | 2 |
| **21** | **`line21_total_credits_add_lines19_20`** | **`f2_13[0]`** | **2** |
| 22 | `line22_tax_less_credits` | `f2_14[0]` | 2 |

CSV source: `C:\us-tax\us-tax-ui\public\irs\f1040_field_mapping_semantic.csv`.

Frontend fill:

```typescript
// form-tax-return-1040.component.ts line 326
values['line21_total_credits_add_lines19_20'] = this.formatAmount(form.taxAndCredits?.totalCredits);
```

`formatAmount` produces empty string when `totalCredits` is null, leaving the PDF cell blank.

---

## Java Model

`C:\us-tax\us-tax-be\src\main\java\com\ustax\model\output\TaxAndCredits.java`:

```java
private BigDecimal totalCredits;    // line 21 — null when zero
public BigDecimal getTotalCredits() { return totalCredits; }
public void setTotalCredits(BigDecimal totalCredits) { this.totalCredits = totalCredits; }
```

---

## Guardrails (from lines/21.md §6)

| Rule | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `line21 = line19 + line20` only | structural | no other credits enter here |
| `line21 >= 0` | structural | both addends are non-negative |
| `line21 <= line18` | soft invariant | guaranteed only when upstream CLW limits worked correctly |
| `line21` stored as null when zero | persistence convention | distinct from line 22 always-set / line 24 zero-when-zero |
| line 21 does NOT include refundable credits / payments / Schedule 2 other taxes | structural | those land at lines 27a-31 (refundable) / 25-26 (payments) / 23 (other taxes) |

---

## Lock-in Tests

`TaxReturnComputeServiceTest.java`:

| Test | Line | Assertion |
|---|---|---|
| `line21_equalsLine19PlusLine20_ctcAndAotc` | 24139 | `totalCredits == line19 + line20` |
| `line21_isNullWhenNoCreditsPresent` | 24187 | `totalCredits == null` when both inputs zero |
| `line21_line22FlooredAtZeroWhenCreditsAbsorbAllTax` | 24215 | `taxAfterCredits == 0` when credits absorb line 18 |
